definition: to owe besides  or still , (Thucydides): absolute, προσοφείλοντας ἡμᾶς ἐνέγραψεν (Demosthenes Orator):—;Pass. to be still owing, be still due , (Thucydides); so, ἡ ἔχθρη ἡ προσοφειλομένη ἐς Ἀθηναίους ἐκ τῶν Αἰγινητέων the hatred which was still due  from the Aeginetans to the Athenians, i. e. their ancient feud, (Herdotus Historicus) (ML)
